'''âf-t-w-j''' ('''kafatwejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aluminise|aluminise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aluminise|aluminise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-t-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kafatwejoko
|}
